name: Human serum ¹H-NMR physiological panel
source: Psychogios et al. 2011, The Human Serum Metabolome (PLoS ONE 6:e16957) — NMR-quantified subset
note: Restricts serum annotation/deconvolution candidates to real serum metabolites (cuts over-annotation vs the ~578 generic BMRB library). Urea omitted (all-exchangeable → D2O-invisible). Broad lipid/lipoprotein envelope is a matrix feature, not a discrete metabolite.
